creator: fluffy@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to rachid from comment #0)

Something wrong with your installation. 
Do you build in clean environment with poudriere/synth?


Both devel/libcutl and textproc/libkolabxml was bumped after boost update but your errorlog shows libcutl was not rebuilded.

>> ld-elf.so.1: Shared object "libboost_system.so.1.82.0" not found, required by "libcutl-1.10.so"

moreover, libcutl is not a dependency for libkolabxml but for devel/xsd which is used to convert xml files.
